meta_description: We are here to help you with all of your moving needs, including packing and storage. We offer a man and van service in Tunbridge Wells and the surrounding areas. Contact us now for your free quote!
intro_paragraph: Introducing Mark Ratcliffe's man with a van service throughout Tunbridge Wells and the neighbouring areas. This low-cost service is perfect for smaller moves which don't need an entire cluster of removals vans and numerous staff. Offering office removals, flat moves, house removal moves or even student accommodation moves, we have the perfect solution for you. We offer a small van alongside a working man who will be there for you until you are comfortably moved in. Our removals services are available any time - even weekends at no extra cost. We understand you may not work 9-5, therefore we work flexibly so that we can fit in the move to your schedule.

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Man and Van Tunbridge Wells

Offering superb removal services, storage and packing solutions at fantastic prices. Mark Ratcliffe can help you with any move!

How can we help you today?

Perfect for Small Domestic or Commercial Moves in Tunbridge Wells

Introducing Mark Ratcliffe's man with a van service throughout Tunbridge Wells and the neighbouring areas. This low-cost service is perfect for smaller moves which don't need an entire cluster of removals vans and numerous staff. Offering office removals, flat moves, house removal moves or even student accommodation moves, we have the perfect solution for you. We offer a small van alongside a working man who will be there for you until you are comfortably moved in. Our removals services are available any time - even weekends at no extra cost. We understand you may not work 9-5, therefore we work flexibly so that we can fit in the move to your schedule.

What You Will Receive

Looking for a man and van in Tunbridge Wells? You can choose whether you need a working driver or just a driver - depending on your requirements. All of our staff are experienced, who are familiar with the local area and therefore will reach your moving destination quickly and hassle-free. Our vans are all equipped with suitable safety supplies to keep your belongings secure and in good condition during transit. Our vans all come with tie rails, furniture covers, loading ramps and sack trucks.

We have many additional extras which will make your move easier. We offer a packing and unpacking service which is carried out by trained experts who will always prioritise the safety of your goods. We supply flat pack moving boxes and other packing supplies at great prices which can be collected from our shop. We offer easy access self storage units which are clean, large and secure for just £30 (+ VAT) per week, perfect for when your new destination isn't ready for you just yet.

Man and Van Office and House Removal Company Tunbridge Wells - Rates‍

We are proud to offer exceptional service at affordable rates. This is something we have always made sure to prioritise and always will do. We offer two different pricing options:‍

  • ‍Man with Van and working driver - £70 per hour ‍
  • Man with Van and driver only - £50 per hour (you load and unload the van)

All of the prices above are inclusive of vat and fuel (within a local area) and there is no additional charges for weekend moving.

Whether your move is local to Tunbridge Wells or even overseas, we can offer a house removals man and van service which suits you! Contact us for more information or press the 'Request a Quote' button at the top of this page.
